creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
(please CC me, I don't get responses otherwise)

Well, we can make -devel port use subversion as an option when there are
no development releases for a long time. Similar to devel/llvm-devel
port. Besides, it wouldn't be the first -devel port to be older than
non-devel one. For now we have ports/146359.

Your first patch was also incorrect in that it used redundant DATADIR
entries in plist. Makefile's PORTDATA=* already adds all files under
DATADIR in plist.

This one looks OK but you can avoid some hunks. See below

--- a.diff begins here ---
diff -uprNd -x CVS wesnoth/Makefile wesnoth-devel/Makefile
--- wesnoth/Makefile
+++ wesnoth-devel/Makefile
@@ -20,5 +21,4 @@
 
-USE_GCC=	4.2+
 USE_SDL=	image mixer net ttf
 USE_GNOME=	desktopfileutils gnometarget pango
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
@@ -36,7 +37,7 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--localstatedir=/var \
 		--with-localedir=${PREFIX}/share/locale
 
 MANLANG_GAME=	zh_TW
-MANLANG=	"" gl cs de en_GB es et fi fr hu it ja lt pl pt_BR sk \
+MANLANG=	"" cs de en_GB es et fi fr gl hu it ja lt pl pt_BR sk \
 		sr sr@ijekavian sr@ijekavianlatin sr@latin tr zh_CN
 
 MAN6=		wesnoth.6
@@ -104,8 +105,8 @@ PLIST_SUB+=		CAMPAIGN=""
 .endif
 
 .if defined(WITHOUT_EDITOR)
-PLIST_SUB+=		EDITOR="@comment "
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-editor
+PLIST_SUB+=		EDITOR="@comment "
 .else
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-editor
 PLIST_SUB+=		EDITOR=""
--- a.diff ends here ---
